型的广告主，在日益复杂的市场环境中，难以准确解读绩效信号。衡量不完善信号下的 增长

和中层活动的价值。采用  “多触点归因”

告主，能够清晰洞察  “辅助价值”  与 “跨

策略，减少了为追求短期效果而过度投

力的倾向。用模型填补信号缺失的空白
2025年，由隐私保护导致的信号缺失

message.content:
This section addresses retrieval queries regarding advertising measurement maturity, attribution modeling, and privacy-driven signal mitigation in 2025. It answers questions across the following dimensions:
• **Topics & Claims:** How refined measurement capabilities determine corporate expansion vs. stagnation; why advanced attribution frameworks enable decisive budget allocation and clearer optimization while simple models fail; how last-click attribution undervalues top/mid-funnel activities; how multi-touch attribution reveals assist value and cross-channel impact to balance media strategies and protect long-term growth; and how leading advertisers successfully navigate persistent iOS privacy signal loss.
• **Entities & Dates:** 2025; Singular (publisher); iOS platform; game advertisers; leading/top enterprises.
• **Definitions & Concepts:** Last-Click Attribution, Multi-Touch Attribution (MTA), Assist Value, Cross-Channel Impact, Modeled Conversions, Hybrid Performance Metrics, Signal Loss.
• **Procedures & Practices:** Allocating budgets using advanced attribution frameworks; adopting MTA to evaluate full-funnel value; deploying modeled conversions and hybrid metrics to maintain optimization continuity; aligning internal stakeholders around modeled outputs to reduce friction and accelerate decision-making.
• **Metrics & Indicators:** Performance signals, assist value, cross-channel impact, modeled conversion outputs, hybrid performance indicators.
• **Evidence Types:** Industry trend data from the Singular 2025 Quarterly Trends Report; observational analysis of advertiser adaptation to privacy constraints and market complexity.
• **Tables & Figures:** None explicitly detailed in the text.
**Retrieval Utility:** Optimized for queries on the business impact of attribution model selection, operational strategies to overcome iOS signal loss, measurement-driven budget allocation, and how modeled metrics improve internal alignment and decision speed.
message.reasoning_content:
Here's a thinking process:

1.  **Analyze User Input:**
   - **Task:** Create a retrieval-oriented summary for a document section.
   - **Focus:** What questions this section can answer (topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, evidence types).
   - **Constraint:** Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.
   - **Input Metadata:** node_id: "0055", title: "成熟的衡量能力，铸就竞争优势", page_index: 38, page_range: "38-39"
   - **Input Text:** (Chinese text about measurement capabilities, attribution models, signal loss, modeled conversions, etc., referencing Singular 2025 Quarterly Trends Report)

2.  **Deconstruct the Input Text (Mental Translation & Extraction):**
   - *Title:* 成熟的衡量能力，铸就竞争优势 (Mature measurement capabilities forge competitive advantage)
   - *Key Point 1:* 2025年，精细化衡量能力，往往决定了企业是迈向自信扩张，还是陷于谨慎停滞。(In 2025, refined measurement capabilities determine whether companies expand confidently or stagnate cautiously.)
   - *Key Point 2:* 拥有先进归因框架的广告主，能更果断地分配预算，优化方向也更清晰；而依赖简单模型的广告主，在日益复杂的市场环境中，难以准确解读绩效信号。(Advertisers with advanced attribution frameworks allocate budgets more decisively and have clearer optimization directions; those relying on simple models struggle to interpret performance signals in complex markets.)
   - *Data Source:* 数据来源： Singular 2025 年季度趋势报告 (Data source: Singular 2025 Quarterly Trends Report)
   - *Subsection 1:* 突破末次点击归因的局限 (Breaking the limitations of last-click attribution)
     - “末次点击归因”模式仍在低估漏斗上层和中层活动的价值。(Last-click attribution still undervalues top/mid-funnel activities.)
     - 采用“多触点归因”（Multi-Touch Attribution）的游戏广告主，能够清晰洞察“辅助价值”与“跨渠道影响”。(Game advertisers using Multi-Touch Attribution can clearly see "assist value" and "cross-channel impact".)
     - 这一洞察助力广告主制定更均衡的媒体策略，减少了为追求短期效果而过度投入漏斗底层策略、进而损害长期增长潜力的倾向。(This insight helps create balanced media strategies, reducing over-investment in bottom-funnel for short-term gains that harms long-term growth.)
   - *Subsection 2:* 用模型填补信号缺失的空白 (Using models to fill the gap of missing signals)
     - 2025年，由隐私保护导致的信号缺失（尤其在 iOS 端）并未消失，但领先的广告主已找到应对之法。(In 2025, signal loss due to privacy protection, especially on iOS, persists, but leading advertisers have found solutions.)
     - “模型转化”（Modeled Conversions）与“混合绩效指标”让团队得以维持优化工作的连续性。(Modeled Conversions and hybrid performance metrics allow teams to maintain optimization continuity.)
     - 围绕模型化产出结果凝聚各相关方共识，头部企业有效减少了内部摩擦，加速了决策进程。(Aligning stakeholders around modeled outputs reduces internal friction and accelerates decision-making for top enterprises.)

3.  **Map to Required Categories (Topics, Entities, Dates, Definitions, Procedures, Claims, Tables/Figures, Metrics, Evidence Types):**
   - *Topics:* Advertising measurement capabilities, attribution models, signal loss/privacy impact, budget allocation, media strategy optimization, long-term vs. short-term growth.
   - *Entities:* Singular (data source/report publisher), iOS (platform), game advertisers, leading/top enterprises/advertisers.
   - *Dates:* 2025.
   - *Definitions/Concepts:* 末次点击归因 (Last-Click Attribution), 多触点归因 (Multi-Touch Attribution), 辅助价值 (Assist Value), 跨渠道影响 (Cross-Channel Impact), 模型转化 (Modeled Conversions), 混合绩效指标 (Hybrid Performance Metrics), 信号缺失 (Signal Loss).
   - *Procedures/Practices:* Using advanced attribution frameworks for budget allocation; adopting multi-touch attribution to evaluate top/mid-funnel value; implementing modeled conversions and hybrid metrics to maintain optimization continuity; aligning stakeholders on modeled outputs to reduce friction and speed up decisions.
   - *Claims:* Refined measurement determines expansion vs. stagnation in 2025. Advanced attribution leads to clearer optimization and decisive budgeting. Last-click undervalues upper/mid-funnel. Multi-touch reveals assist/cross-channel value, enabling balanced strategies and protecting long-term growth. Privacy-driven signal loss (iOS) persists but is mitigated by modeling. Modeled outputs align stakeholders and accelerate decisions.
   - *Tables/Figures:* None explicitly mentioned in the text, but references a data source/report.
   - *Metrics/Indicators:* 绩效信号 (Performance signals), 辅助价值 (Assist value), 跨渠道影响 (Cross-channel impact), 模型转化 (Modeled conversions), 混合绩效指标 (Hybrid performance metrics).
   - *Evidence Types:* Industry trend report (Singular 2025 Quarterly Trends Report), observational/analytical claims about advertiser behavior and market conditions.

4.  **Draft the Summary (Retrieval-Oriented Format):**
   Structure it to directly answer potential retrieval questions, mapping to the requested categories. Keep it concise and factual.

   *Draft:*
   This section addresses questions regarding the strategic impact of advanced advertising measurement and attribution in 2025. It covers:
   - **Topics & Claims:** How refined measurement capabilities determine corporate expansion vs. stagnation; the limitations of last-click attribution in undervaluing top/mid-funnel activities; how multi-touch attribution reveals assist value and cross-channel impact to balance media strategies and protect long-term growth; and how privacy-driven signal loss (especially on iOS) is mitigated through modeling.
   - **Entities & Dates:** 2025 market context; Singular (publisher of the 2025 Quarterly Trends Report); iOS platform; game advertisers and leading enterprises.
   - **Definitions & Concepts:** Last-Click Attribution, Multi-Touch Attribution (MTA), Assist Value, Cross-Channel Impact, Modeled Conversions, Hybrid Performance Metrics, Signal Loss.
   - **Procedures & Practices:** Allocating budgets using advanced attribution frameworks; adopting MTA to evaluate full-funnel value; implementing modeled conversions and hybrid metrics to maintain optimization continuity; aligning internal stakeholders around modeled outputs to reduce friction and accelerate decision-making.
   - **Metrics & Evidence:** Performance signals, assist value, cross-channel impact, modeled conversion rates, and hybrid performance indicators. Evidence is drawn from the Singular 2025 Quarterly Trends Report and industry observations on advertiser adaptation to privacy changes.
   - **Retrieval Focus:** Answers questions on why advanced attribution outperforms simple models, how to address iOS privacy signal loss, the business impact of multi-touch vs. last-click attribution, and how modeled metrics improve internal alignment and decision speed.

5.  **Refine & Check Constraints:**
   - *Retrieval-oriented?* Yes, structured to map to query types.
   - *Focus on specified categories?* Covered topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables/figures (noted absence), metrics, evidence types.
   - *No invented facts?* Strictly based on provided text.

Advanced attribution frameworks enable decisive budget allocation and clearer optimization, while simple models fail in complex markets. Last-click attribution undervalues top/mid-funnel activities. Multi-touch attribution reveals assist value and cross-channel impact, enabling balanced media strategies that protect long-term growth. Privacy-driven signal loss (especially on iOS) persists but is mitigated by modeling.

   **Definitions & Concepts:** Last-Click Attribution, Multi-Touch Attribution (MTA), Assist Value, Cross-Channel Impact, Modeled Conversions, Hybrid Performance Metrics, Signal Loss.
   **Procedures & Practices:** Using advanced attribution for budget allocation; adopting MTA to evaluate full-funnel value; deploying modeled conversions and hybrid metrics to maintain optimization continuity; aligning stakeholders around modeled outputs to reduce internal friction and accelerate decisions.
   **Metrics & Indicators:** Performance signals, assist value, cross-channel impact, modeled conversion outputs, hybrid performance metrics.

response_text:
This section addresses retrieval queries regarding advertising measurement maturity, attribution modeling, and privacy-driven signal mitigation in 2025. It answers questions across the following dimensions:
• **Topics & Claims:** How refined measurement capabilities determine corporate expansion vs. stagnation; why advanced attribution frameworks enable decisive budget allocation and clearer optimization while simple models fail; how last-click attribution undervalues top/mid-funnel activities; how multi-touch attribution reveals assist value and cross-channel impact to balance media strategies and protect long-term growth; and how leading advertisers successfully navigate persistent iOS privacy signal loss.
• **Entities & Dates:** 2025; Singular (publisher); iOS platform; game advertisers; leading/top enterprises.
• **Definitions & Concepts:** Last-Click Attribution, Multi-Touch Attribution (MTA), Assist Value, Cross-Channel Impact, Modeled Conversions, Hybrid Performance Metrics, Signal Loss.
• **Procedures & Practices:** Allocating budgets using advanced attribution frameworks; adopting MTA to evaluate full-funnel value; deploying modeled conversions and hybrid metrics to maintain optimization continuity; aligning internal stakeholders around modeled outputs to reduce friction and accelerate decision-making.
• **Metrics & Indicators:** Performance signals, assist value, cross-channel impact, modeled conversion outputs, hybrid performance indicators.
• **Evidence Types:** Industry trend data from the Singular 2025 Quarterly Trends Report; observational analysis of advertiser adaptation to privacy constraints and market complexity.
• **Tables & Figures:** None explicitly detailed in the text.
**Retrieval Utility:** Optimized for queries on the business impact of attribution model selection, operational strategies to overcome iOS signal loss, measurement-driven budget allocation, and how modeled metrics improve internal alignment and decision speed.
